title: I Knew at First Glance That It Was No Ordinary Fluffball
overview: Cocoa's first day at the Rabbit House Cafe is lively as she meets and becomes friends with Chino and Rize in a heartbeat.

title: The Girl Who Loved Wheat and the Girl Loved by Azuki Beans
overview: While getting ready for the first day of school, Cocoa runs into a new friend at the park. Cocoa's and her friends decide to bake bread and visit Chiya's coffee house.

title: Do You Remember the Day You First Got Drunk? You Tried to Light a Campfire in Your Own Home, Didn't You?
overview: Cocoa and company make a new friend, Sharo. Afterward, they enjoy some tea at Sharo's teahouse and spend the night at Rabbit House telling scary stories.

title: Your Lucky Items Are Vegetables, Crime, and Punishment
overview: Cocoa practices her fortune telling technique using caffe-de-mancy, and the girls head to the library on a sunny afternoon.

title: Cocoa and Murderous Intent Without Malice
overview: The girls begin practicing for the ball sports tournament at school, with unsurprising results. Father's Day is near, and Rize takes up extra jobs to get her father a gift.

title: A Story About Telling a Story
overview: Chino's friends help out at the Rabbit House and take a shining to Cocoa and Rize, leaving Chino the odd man out.

title: Call Me Sister
overview: Chino and Cocoa get into small, cute fights with each other over puzzles and pancakes. Later, the girls hand out flyers for their cafes.

title: Wet with Pool Water, Wet with Rain, Wet with Tears
overview: Cocoa and the other girls take it upon themselves to teach Rize how to swim at the hot spring pool. Late, they watch a movie based on Aoyama's book together.

title: Aoyama Slump Mountain
overview: Chino learns from a stray paper airplane that Aoyama is quitting her job as a novelist and takes up a part-time job at the Rabbit House.

title: The Anti-Sister Battle Corps, AKA The Chimame Corps
overview: While Cocoa helps Chiya study for the upcoming exams, Megu and Maya help our at Rabbit House. Later, a trip to the pool is in order.

title: The Girl Dons a Red Coat and Drives a Team of Rabbits Across the Christmas Eve Night Sky
overview: To celebrate the Christmas season, the girls decide to throw a Christmas party. Let the planning commence!

title: For You, I Can Sleep Late
overview: Cocoa runs a fever, and the girls head out to get her some medicine. After she heals, Chino ends up with the mumps.

title: 1st Bunny: This Is My Self-Proclaimed Big Sister Whose Smiles and Flashes are Boisterous
overview: It’s been a year since Cocoa arrived at Rabbit House, and she wants to send her mom pictures of her friends. If only she could get Chino to pose for a picture!

title: 2nd Bunny: Grey Rabbit and Cinderella
overview: Sharo’s being plagued by a ghost… or is she? Later, the girls visit Rize’s mansion and find themselves dressed up as maids!

title: 3rd bunny: Spinning Dance Legend Duck Squad
overview: Chino, Megu, and Maya have to come up with sketches and a creative dance for a school fine arts project. Will Chino’s ballet lessons take her away from Rabbit House?

title: 4th Bunny: Cocoa-senpai’s Elegant Tea Party Tutorial
overview: The high school girls treat Chino, Megu, and Maya to a classy afternoon tea party. In an effort to be more “grown up,” the younger girls observe and copy the older girls.

title: 5th Bunny: I Saw Through Your Ordinary Springiness at First Bite
overview: Cocoa’s sister, Mocha, arrives at Rabbit House, and she’s ready to cuddle everyone in sight! Against Mocha, does Cocoa stand a chance at keeping her “big sister” status?

title: 6th Bunny: Wooden Framework Town, Mission Complete
overview: Mocha continues to effortlessly win all of Cocoa’s friends over and claim them as her new “little sisters.” How will Mocha react when Cocoa starts to treat her coldly?

title: 7th bunny: That Spoiled Girl, Like a Soap Bubble, Will Fleetingly Disappear
overview: An accidental spill on her uniform sends Cocoa on a soapy, bubbly adventure. Later, the girls debate dinner, and Chino attempts to speak less stiffly with her friends.

title: 8th bunny: Sneaking Stalking Stalker Story
overview: The new school year begins with high hopes and cute supplies, but Sharo and Cocoa get into a fight, Maya worries about the future, and the girls end up stalking each other!

title: 9th bunny: The Furball Suicide Attacks, and the Merciless Button is Launched
overview: An ancient rivalry between Rabbit House and Ama Usa An?! Rize and Cocoa “interrogate” Sharo for answers and discover the origin of Chiya’s obsession with strange menu items.

title: 10th Bunny: Everyday Life Searching for E
overview: The ever popular Rize recruits Sharo to help her with her packed club schedule. Later, Cocoa desperately tries to find someone to play outside with her.

title: 11th Bunny: Stardust Mayim-Mayim
overview: A perfect vacation to a mountain cabin changes into quest for survival?! The girls go fishing, hunt for mushrooms, stargaze, and pull zombie pranks on each other!

title: 12th Bunny: The Treasure is Your Decisive Moment
overview: Chino unveils her talents as a budding photographer. Later, Cocoa finds a map hidden at Rabbit House, the ensuing treasure hunt takes the girls on an adventure around town.

title: Bunnisode 1: The Magician at the Cafe of Smiles
overview: The Rabbit House staff decides to beat the heat by making summer uniforms! However, the perfect pink fabric for Cocoa proves elusive…

title: Bunnisode 2: The Case of the Childhood Friend's Stolen Heart
overview: An unexpected trek through the spooky woods puts Sharo and Chiya’s relationship to the test, but there’s more to the situation than meets the eye…

title: Bunnisode 3: Everything in the World Serves as My Experience Points
overview: Their futures are still undecided, so Chino, Megu and Maya attend a high school information fair! But this place seems pretty fancy… wait, where the heck did Megu go!?

title: Bunnisode 4: A Potential Everyday Life
overview: The class cultural festival is underway, and it’s sure to be an unforgettable experience when Cocoa and Chiya are in charge of the class café.

title: Bunnisode 5: She is a Fierce Whirlwind, She is a Carefree Breeze
overview: A school marathon poses a daunting challenge for Chiya, but with a little of Rize’s training, she’ll race to the finish for the sake of Ama Usa An!

title: Bunnisode 6: A Fluffle of Rabbits is Also Most Welcome
overview: Picture day is here, and new looks are in order — except for Megu, Chino and Maya, that is. They’ll band together to keep it natural. Too bad there’s a traitor in their midst…

title: Bunnisode 7: We Shall Dance With Ghosts Until Dawn on This Halloween Night!
overview: It’s finally Halloween, and things are about to get sPoOoOoOoKy at all the local cafés. From candy to costumes, it’s bound to be a scary-fun time for all!

title: Bunnisode 8: Stamp, Sleep, Study, Smile
overview: After a fight with her father, Rize runs away from home. Can she learn to be a fantastic teacher and finally earn his approval? Cocoa and Chino are here to help!

title: Bunnisode 9: Chamomile With a Dash of Jealousy
overview: When they were children, Sharo gave Chiya a precious gift that she treasures to this day… but wait. Where did it go!? Chiya can’t find her memento anywhere!

title: Bunnisode 10: A Request for Backup From a Full Heart
overview: Tis the season for a Secret Santa gift exchange! But the Christmas season is so busy, Chino will need all the help she can get to keep the Rabbit House afloat.

title: Bunnisode 11: The Cafe of Smiles and the Rainbow Magician
overview: Reinforcements arrive at the Rabbit House to help Chino during the holiday rush! With everyone gathered together, it’s sure to be a very Merry Christmas indeed.

title: Bunnisode 12: I Can Take That Step Forward Because You Are Watching
overview: Even while apart, Mocha and Cocoa continue to inspire one another. Meanwhile, Chino finds inspiration through all of her friends — but especially through Cocoa.
